_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: [jurisdictional_scope] The EUDR applies to operators and traders placing in-scope commodities on the EU market or exporting them, covering large/medium operators from 30 December 2026 and micro/small operators from 30 June 2027.
prior.source_span: The EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) requires that, from 30 December 2026, products placed on, sold within, or exported from the EU are free from deforestation.
